---
title: "report"
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
load("data/clean/clean.RData")

eq_counts <- clean |>
  mutate(date = as.Date(ymd_hms(time))) |>
  count(date)

ggplot(eq_counts, aes(x = date, y = n)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#2C7FB8") +
  labs(
    title = "Earthquakes per Day",
    x = "Date",
    y = "Count"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
